description: Comprehensive AD health dashboard: LDAP, Authentication, Directory Ops, SAM, Replication, ADCS, ATQ

panels.description: Active LDAP client sessions. Sustained high values indicate an overworked DC.
panels.title: LDAP Client Sessions

panels.description: Time for last LDAP bind. Values >0 indicate bind latency.
panels.title: Last Bind Time

panels.description: Average ATQ request latency in milliseconds.
panels.title: ATQ Request Latency

panels.description: Rate of authentication binds by method. NTLM and simple binds may indicate legacy clients.
panels.title: Bind Rate by Method

panels.description: Difference between user creation requests and successful completions.
panels.title: User Creation Failed Requests

panels.description: Spikes here may indicate bulk provisioning or a security event.
panels.title: Password & Membership Changes Rate

panels.description: Non-zero means replication queue is backing up.
panels.title: Pending Replication Operations

panels.description: Any non-zero value indicates a schema version mismatch between DCs.
panels.title: Schema Mismatch Failures (total)

title: Active Directory — Domain Controller Health
